title: Simple Paxels
description: This mod adds 6 new tools to minecraft called paxels, these are a combination of an axe, pickaxe and shovel
body:
[![Fabric API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/)
[![GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/Fej1Dev/Simple-Paxels)

This mod adds 6 new tool to minecraft called paxels, these are a combination of an axe, pickaxe and shovel.

### How to craft a paxel?
To craft a paxel, you need an axe,
shovel and pickaxe **from the *same* material** and 2 sticks.
In a crafting table, place the items like so:

![Paxel Crafting Gif](http://129.159.139.103:8081/paxel_crafting.gif/?raw=true)
